_meta.description: Primary experiment configuration for CLIRS. Edit this file; see run.yaml for a flat readable reference.
_meta.status: active — pipeline.py loads this file by default
_meta.metrics_note: Metric definitions (life, end, …) live in Utils/complete_algorithm.py and are copied into Results/.../manifest.json on first trial — not duplicated here.

seeds._note: data seed: subsample + learner split + clustering. rl: one entry per trial (future multi-seed reporting).

_rules.first_recommendation: First course in a k-step sequence (uses diff_cluster_increase in code today)
_rules.same_cluster_increase: Reward improved and same cluster as previous step
_rules.diff_cluster_increase: Reward improved and different cluster, or first recommendation
_rules.same_cluster_decrease: Disabled in current code (penalty removed, fixed at 1.0)
_rules.diff_cluster_decrease: Disabled in current code (penalty removed, fixed at 1.0)
_rules.no_improvement: Current reward not better than best so far (fixed at 1.0 in code)
